name: Kandji Newly Created Privileged Accounts
description: Detects privileged Kandji accounts created in the last 7 days for expedited review.
query: SELECT u.user_id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.created_at AS created_at FROM kandji_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.is_active, true) = true AND (LOWER(COALESCE(u.role, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role, '')) LIKE '%super%') AND u.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
remediation: Confirm change tickets and owner approval for newly created privileged accounts.
